title: Cortina Hook Signal v1
description: The resolved signal that cortina emits after processing a hook event. Producer: cortina hook handlers. Consumer: Claude Code (via exit code), Annulus (via JSON body), and Cap (via JSON logging).

signal.description: The resolved signal. allow=proceed (exit 0), block_tool=deny this tool call (exit 2), halt_turn=stop the entire agent turn (exit 49).

reason.description: Human-readable explanation for the signal. Optional but recommended.

exit_code.description: The process exit code cortina uses to communicate the signal to Claude Code. 0=allow, 2=block_tool, 49=halt_turn.
